text:
Created attachment 167924
patch to update the port

- Update to ver 1.5.0
Changes: https://github.com/openxpki/openxpki/commits/master

- "portlint -AC" gives 3 non-relevant warnings.

Please note that we can not go without gettext, i18n is needed here even for English.

- Tested with poudriere at 11.0-CURRENT-amd64 with perl5-5.20
